title: Convert YAML Mapping to JSON Object
cap_description: Convert a YAML mapping to a JSON object
documentation:
## Purpose

Converts a single YAML mapping into a JSON object. Use this when a downstream cap expects a JSON record but the upstream produces a YAML mapping.

## Inputs

A YAML mapping.

## Outputs

A JSON object.

## Notes

- Semantically lossless for all YAML types that JSON supports (YAML-only types like dates are converted to strings).
- For the reverse, use [Convert JSON Object to YAML Mapping](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:json;record;textable";op=convert_format;out="media:record;textable;yaml").
- For sequences of mappings, use [Convert YAML List of Mappings to JSON Array of Objects](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:list;record;textable;yaml";op=convert_format;out="media:json;list;record;textable").
